functional_requirements.requirement: Display Google map view on the main screen
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: This app consists of a Google map view on the main screen.

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide multiple routes to reach destination from source with traffic and pollution status updates
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: A user can select the source to destination path which then will be processed to give a number of routes to reach the destination from source with amount of traffic at various locations in that path along with current pollution status in that route (which updates overtime).

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow users to blow horn to all users within a specific radius
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: If there exists a traffic jam, a user can blow a horn to all users within a specific radius.

functional_requirements.requirement: Send notifications to users in specified radius when user blows horn
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: According to his current location in the form of a small notification which the persons in the specified radius will receive.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow users to report accidents to concerned authority
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The accidents that occurred at specific spots will be reported by the user to the concerned authority who will do the rescue operations

functional_requirements.requirement: Categorize accident-prone areas based on number of accidents
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: and a notification appears for the user to drive slow and safe when they are in that particular location.

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide information about hotels and restaurants along chosen route
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Meals- on- wheel provides information about hotels and restaurants which are available in the chosen route so that the user can place the order as per the available menu at a particular eating place including time of service

functional_requirements.requirement: Send SMS to caller when driver is driving beyond speed limit
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: This module would send an SMS to the caller that the particular person is driving when the geo- coordinates show the mobile shifting of the driver is beyond some specified speed limit (say, 20 kmph)

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow users to turn on drive-mode before start of journey
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Before start of the journey, this module can be turned on.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow users to give feedback about traffic and pollution levels in given area
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The feedback feature allows the user to give feedbacks about the accuracy in the traffic and pollution levels in a given area

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
This system is useful in the road transport and highways field (Ministry of Road Transport and
Highways). Green rides is a technical solution for the general public to guide them to a less polluted path while travelling, to know about the traffic jam, identification of accident- prone spots,
meals- on- wheel, the establishment of drive-mode applications. This app consists of a Google map
view on the main screen. A user can select the source to destination path which then will be
processed to give a number of routes to reach the destination from source with amount of traffic
at various locations in that path along with current pollution status in that route (which updates
overtime). If there exists a traffic jam, a user can blow a horn to all users within a specific radius.
According to his current location in the form of a small notification which the persons in the specified radius will receive. The accidents that occurred at specific spots will be reported by the user
to the concerned authority who will do the rescue operations and hence the accident- prone areas
will be categorized based on the number of accidents taking place and a notification appears for
the user to drive slow and safe when they are in that particular location. The road authority admin
checks the system often. Meals- on- wheel provides information about hotels and restaurants which
are available in the chosen route so that the user can place the order as per the available menu at
a particular eating place including time of service so that one need not wait at the restaurant for
placing the order. Drive- mode helps to minimize the risks of accidents while attending mobile
phones during driving. This module would send an SMS to the caller that the particular person is
driving when the geo- coordinates show the mobile shifting of the driver is beyond some specified
speed limit (say, 20 kmph). Before start of the journey, this module can be turned on. The feedback feature allows the user to give feedbacks about the accuracy in the traffic and pollution levels
in a given area (Figures 33.1–33.8).
>>>
